message:
fix(dolt): add spec_id column migration for existing databases

Adds a migration to add the spec_id column to the issues table in
existing Dolt databases. New databases already have this column from
the schema definition; this migration handles databases created before
the column was added.

Fixes bd-dw9wn: spec_id column missing from beads database schema

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
